key_evidence: State Duma passed Civic Death Law in second and third readings May 26, 2026
Law denies passports, government digital services, banking, property to exiled critics convicted of politically motivated charges
Effective September 1, 2026; affects estimated 1+ million emigrated Russians
Independently classified as benchmark-novel by HRW (May 25) and Meduza (May 26)
Russia at composite 0.0 absolute floor — methodology category promotion only
methodology_note: FORMAL CATEGORY PROMOTION. May 26 scale-floor annotation promoted to formal benchmark methodology category. Criteria defined: (1) state legislation targeting emigrated nationals, (2) conviction-triggered multi-dimensional deprivation, (3) speech/political offense basis, (4) independent HR body documentation. Russia is first benchmark-documented instance.
